goal: Record whether fixture agent-attempt evals used an explicit, environment, or default DeepSeek-native agent command source.
tests: cargo run --quiet --bin yoyo -- eval fixtures attempt --suite local-smoke --task fixture-agent-attempt-eval --worktree /tmp/yoyo-ds-fixture-default-agent --default-agent --dry-run
hidden_failure_mode: Fixture agent attempts persist rendered commands, but release triage cannot tell whether the source patch attempt used a handcrafted command, an environment override, or the built-in DeepSeek-native default agent.
